titleStmt.title: SII 29.101: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 101. (A.R. No. B. 236 of 1962-63.) DŪḌKI, BANASWADA TALUK, NIZAMABAD DISTRICT.

summary.p: On four faces of a pillar setup near the dhavajasthaṁbha in the Sōmēśvara temple beyond the Pirula-Cheruvu.

It refers to the rule of Chālukya Bhūlōkamalladēva who was ruling the empire from the capital Kalyāṇa and to his mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara Sōma-permmāḍi who is described as Paṁpana gandhavāraṇa. The latter made a grant of the mēlāḷike including taxes like sēse, kiṟukuḷa, kāṇike etc., of Bāḍa-Bāṁsavāde, situated in Bolle-70 division, to Bālachandradēva for worship, and offerings and for feeding the guests and ascetics.
The record is dated Piṅgaḷa, saṁkramaṇa, sūrya grahamṇa, Monday. Probably it corresponds to 1137 A.D., November 15, Monday. Solar eclipse occured on that day.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samasta bhuvanāAbout four lines of
śrayaṁ śrīpṛthvī
vallabhaṁ mahā
rājādhirāja rāja
paramēsvaraṁ parama
bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśraya
kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷu
kyābharaṇaṁ śrīma
tu bhūlō
kamalladēvara vija
yarājya muttarōtta
rābhivṛddhi pravarddhamā
na mācaṁdrārkka tāraṁ
baraṁ saluttamire rāja
dhāni kalyāṇa purada nela
vīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkha
thāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyu
ttamire tatpāda pa
dmōpajīvigaḷappa
svasti samadhigata paṁ
camahāsabda ma
hā maṇḍaḷēsvara
Aribiruda maṇḍaḷi
ka sarabhabhēruṇḍa du
ṣṭa maṇḍaḷika vainatē
ya Eḍagaṇḍike

viḍiva rājāryya
savalakka malla śa
ṇivārasiddhi paṁ
panagaṁdha vāraṇa
śrīmatu sōma
permmāḍigaḷu
bolleyeppatta
ṟa baḷiya bā
ḍa bāṁsavāḍeya
mēlāḷikeyanu
tri bhōgābhyaṁntara
voḷagāgi Ā
yadāya kā
ṇike śēse keḻu
kuḷa voḷagāgi
Aṁgabhōgakkaṁ raṁgaLetter ga is engraved below the line.
bhōgakkaṁ Athiti A
bhyāgatara tapōdha
nara grāsakkaṁ mā
ṭa kūṭakkaṁ svaśti
yamaniyama
svādhyāya dhyāna
dhāraṇa mōnā
nuṣṭāna japasamā
dhisīḷa saṁpaṁna

rumappa śrīma
tu bāḷacaṁdradē
varige sūryya
grahaṇa saṁkra
maṇa vyatīpāta sō
mavāra nimitta piṁga
ḷa saṁvatsaradaṁdu
kālaṁkacci dhārā
pūrvakaṁ māḍi
koṭṭa . Irntirmmama
nāvanōrvvaṁ pra
tipāḷisuvarasu
gaḷu vāraṇāsi ku
rukṣētra prayāge
yalu sāyira
kavileya Ubhaya
mukhiyāgi vēda
vittugaḷappa sāyi
ra brāhmaṇarige dāna
māḍida phaḷamakku

Inti dharmmamanā
vanōrvvaṁ kiḍisida
nappaḍā tīrtthadalā
brāhmaṇaru ma
nā kavilegaḷa koṁ
da pāpamakku .
bahubbhi rvasudhāda
ttārāmabhisaga
rādabhi . yasya
yasya yadā ka
vyaṁ tasyatasya ta
dā phalaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 29.101 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
